entry.title: OAuth Anomaly Baseline
entry.summary: A compact detection pattern for identifying unusual OAuth grant behavior by comparing per-user token activity against a rolling baseline.

entry.title: LLM Agent Authorization Boundary
entry.summary: A defensive design note for tool-connected LLM systems with separate policy-layer authorization, identity context, and audit logging.

entry.title: Cybersecurity Writing and Publications
entry.summary: Published work on cybersecurity reporting, AI security workflows, prompt-oriented programming, and security documentation.
